title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. juncea
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. juncea is a subspecies of the tufted hair grass, a type of perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. juncea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
